heading: Canada
body:
> **Note:** Your `GST ID Number` is your 9-digit
> [Federal Business Number](https://www.canada.ca/en/services/taxes/business-number.html),
> plus your 2-character program identifier, plus your 4-digit
> reference number.

Atlas charges GST (Goods and Services Tax) unless you provide a valid `GST ID Number`.
To avoid GST (Goods and Services Tax) charges, include a valid `GST ID Number` on your
[default recipients for billing alerts](atlas-billing-profile).

> **Important:** Some Canadian provinces charge a provincial sales tax (PST).
> Atlas always charges PST (Provincial Sales Tax), even with a valid `GST ID Number`.
